calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-01-2013 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-26-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff, Diamondswithcert.com, Inc.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Hatton Trading & sons, Inc., Romesh Chatrath; Ravin Chatrath.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1- 10 dismissed without prejudice.
Declarations submitted in support of request for Judgment admitted in evidence.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $82,363.27
Pre-Judgment Interest at the annual rate of 10%: $22,832.56
Attorney's Fees: $1,000.00
Costs: $570.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $106,765.83
Judgment signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-16-2013 Continued To Oct-22-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appearing for Plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause is re-set Oct-22-2013 at 10:30 AM in Dept. 610. ***NOTE: The continued hearing date of Oct-15-2013 given at the hearing was in error. There will be no hearings on Oct-15-2013 in Department 610.*** Proceedings not reported. (610)

Off Calendar Apr-24-2013 Set For Order To Show Cause On Aug-13-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
